payloads.name: CubeSat 6U
payloads.description: Small university or commercial research satellite - standardized 6-unit form factor

payloads.name: Earth Observation Satellite
payloads.description: High-resolution optical imaging satellite - sun-synchronous orbit for consistent lighting

payloads.name: LEO Weather Satellite
payloads.description: Low-orbit meteorological satellite - global coverage through successive passes

payloads.name: GEO Telecommunications Satellite
payloads.description: Broadband internet and TV broadcast satellite - fixed position above the equator

payloads.name: Geostationary Weather Satellite
payloads.description: GEO meteorological satellite - continuous monitoring of a fixed zone (e.g. Meteosat)

payloads.name: Navigation Satellite (GPS / Galileo)
payloads.description: Positioning satellite in medium Earth orbit - contributes to a navigation constellation

payloads.name: Reconnaissance Satellite
payloads.description: High-resolution military imaging satellite - low or elliptical orbit depending on mission

payloads.name: ISS Resupply Module
payloads.description: Cargo vehicle delivering food, fuel, and scientific equipment to the ISS

payloads.name: Space Telescope
payloads.description: Orbital observatory - astronomical imaging in visible, infrared, or UV light

payloads.name: Lunar Probe
payloads.description: Exploration probe - surface mapping, mineralogical analysis, and crewed mission preparation

payloads.name: Crewed Capsule
payloads.description: Crewed spacecraft for LEO or lunar missions - 4 to 6 astronauts
